title: Carduncellus cuatrecasasii
taxonomy: Carduncellus cuatrecasasii belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is a species of thistle, and its classification also includes the genus Carduncellus. The plant is native to the Iberian Peninsula, and its classification as a distinct species was first established by Cuatrecasas in the field of botany. Carduncellus cuatrecasasii is often classified under the order Asterales. Within the classification, its kingdom is Plantae, indicating it is a type of plant.
